message:
feat(client): finish CLIENT TRACKING / CACHING / PAUSE state machine for live-Redis parity

Tightens several CLIENT-subcommand code paths so the responses match
live Redis byte-for-byte and the state machine survives the
transitions the conformance harness was catching as drift.

fr-store:

- Fixes a real bug in keyspace_events_to_string where the NOTIFY_NEW
  'n' flag was nested inside the NOTIFY_ALL block instead of being a
  top-level flag. If NOTIFY_ALL bits were set without NOTIFY_NEW, the
  serializer already handled it; but if NOTIFY_NEW was set while some
  NOTIFY_ALL bit was missing, the 'n' was dropped and the round-trip
  broke. Moves the 'n' emission outside the NOTIFY_ALL brace so it
  tracks its own flag independently.
- Adds `caching: Option<bool>` to ClientTrackingState so the per-key
  one-shot caching decision from CLIENT CACHING YES/NO can live next
  to the rest of the tracking state rather than being shoved into a
  separate side channel.

fr-command:

- Exposes new public consts (CLIENT_PAUSE_TIMEOUT_INVALID,
  CLIENT_PAUSE_MODE_INVALID) so the runtime can emit the exact
  strings live Redis uses instead of "ERR value is not an integer"
  / "ERR syntax error".
- Replaces validate_client_caching_mode with apply_client_caching_mode
  so the YES/NO decision actually mutates ClientTrackingState.caching
  on success rather than just validating and throwing it away.
- Adds apply_client_tracking_update so re-enabling TRACKING with a
  different BCAST or OPTIN/OPTOUT mode errors out with the canonical
  "ERR You can't switch ... before disabling tracking for this
  client" messages. Two new const strings
  (CLIENT_TRACKING_BCAST_SWITCH_REQUIRES_DISABLE,
  CLIENT_TRACKING_OPT_SWITCH_REQUIRES_DISABLE) carry the parity text.
- client_tracking_flags now emits caching-yes / caching-no bulk
  strings in TRACKINGINFO so clients see the CACHING outcome they
  just set.
- Fixes EXPIRETIME to match Redis's rounding: absolute millisecond
  deadlines become seconds via (abs_ms + 500) / 1000 rather than
  truncating. Also expands parse_expire_options so conflicting
  options return the live Redis bespoke error strings ("NX and XX,
  GT or LT options at the same time are not compatible" and
  "GT and LT options at the same time are not compatible") instead
  of a generic SyntaxError.
- Adds CLIENT_UNBLOCK_REASON_INVALID for the CLIENT UNBLOCK path.

fr-runtime:

- Switches CLIENT PAUSE / TRACKING / CACHING / SETINFO / UNBLOCK to
  the new fr-command helpers and error constants so the runtime no
  longer hand-rolls its own strings.
- Drops the reset of client_lib_name / client_lib_ver in
  ClientSession::reset_for_auth — those two fields now survive an
  authentication reset, matching live Redis behaviour (verified in
  the updated CLIENT SETINFO test covering reset semantics).
- Shortens the CLIENT SETINFO "Unrecognized option" error to match
  live Redis's exact string (no trailing " for CLIENT SETINFO").

fr-server:

- Replaces `crate::try_parse_inline` / `crate::split_inline_args`
  calls in the inline-parser test module with `fr_server::` paths.
  The lib.rs extraction landed in 589556a, but the test module still
  pointed at the binary crate, which broke once the inline-parser
  functions left main.rs for the new library target.

fr-store/tests/metamorphic.rs:

- Adds a tagged_key helper + a local crc16_xmodem implementation so
  the new metamorphic tests can derive the hash-slot for keys with
  and without hash tags and prove that fr-store's crc16_slot honours
  {tag} semantics. Mirrors the Redis Cluster key-hashing rules.
